violations.text: Establishment did not a food safety manager registered with the department of health at time of inspection. An application was given to the person in charge at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and bathroom were lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bathroom. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026
Cornmeal, grease, and butter were observed uncovered with debris in them. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as pecan filling) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as pecan filling during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

Food was observed not marked with the date of preparation in the walk-in refrigerator. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

Pizza, pigs in a blanket, pound cake, crumb cake, and assorted cookies packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Food items were removed from self-service and placed behind the counter at time of inspection. Establishment must not make food items available until labels are placed on them. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

Pepper biscuits, Hermit cookies, and M&M cookies packaged in the food establishment are lacking subingredients. All refrigerated items are lacking labels stating "keep refrigerated". All items are lacking the quantity. All perishable food items are missing expiration dates. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

The screen door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting and screen is broken. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026
Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026
Food (cornmeal, butter, and grease) were observed stored uncovered in the kitchen. Food must be covered to prevent contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026
The blades on the bread slicer were observed rusted. Blades must be replaced/repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves and baking racks have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Establishment must clean shelves and baking racks. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility (including the freezers and walk-in cooler) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back of the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
Both walk-in freezer gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
An accumulation of ice build-up was observed in the walk-in cooler. Establishment is to remove ice build-up. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the walk in cooler and on the three door true. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3 Bay. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2023
The floor in the back prep area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2024
